sub_fields.label: Treatment
sub_fields.name: treatment
sub_fields.instructions: Select the Treatment whose package data should be displayed. If left empty on a single Treatment page, the current Treatment is used.

sub_fields.label: Module Source
sub_fields.name: module_source_message
sub_fields.message: This module renders content from the selected Treatment's Package Includes fields and outputs the built-in booking form in the right column.
